final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of an industrial-style café interior with raw concrete walls and metal pipes.

Style/medium: editorial interior photography, industrial loft aesthetic, architectural digest style
Composition: wide-angle establishing shot from interior center, natural eye level, 24mm lens, balanced foreground and background depth
Subject: vintage brown leather sofa as focal point, exposed concrete walls with visible texture, ceiling-mounted metal ventilation pipes
Scene/backdrop: spacious café interior with large floor-to-ceiling windows, gallery wall with black-and-white photography prints
Lighting/mood: abundant natural daylight streaming through large windows, soft diffused light with gentle shadows, warm and inviting yet rugged atmosphere
Color palette: cool gray concrete as base, warm cognac leather as anchor, black metal accents, neutral whites from daylight
Materials/textures: rough porous concrete surface, brushed steel pipe finish, aged leather with natural patina, matte photo paper prints
Avoid: overly polished surfaces, generic stock photo aesthetic, oversaturated colors, watermark, 8K stuffer terms
